skills.problem: What should we post next with real demand signals?
skills.input: TikTok/YouTube/Instagram trend snippets, search hints, comments/DM FAQs
skills.output: Ranked topic backlog + platform fit + hook directions + CTA
skills.handoff: Send top 3 topics into Creatop script workflow

skills.input: Raw script or opening lines + target audience + product angle
skills.output: Ranked hook variants with rationale and filming complexity
skills.handoff: Push winning hook into Creatop script composer

skills.problem: How to run creator sponsorships without chaos?
skills.input: Brand brief, deliverables, timeline, revision/payment rules
skills.output: Deal plan, risk flags, revision/payment checklist
skills.handoff: Export checklist into team SOP / Notion / Feishu

skills.problem: How to repurpose one idea across TikTok/Reels/Shorts?
skills.handoff: Generate platform-specific script variants in Creatop

skills.problem: Will this content hurt monetization or distribution?
skills.input: Draft script/caption + product claim language + platform context
skills.handoff: Run final safe version through Creatop publishing workflow

skills.problem: How to turn a brand brief into creator-native scripts?
skills.input: Brand brief, ICP, product facts, forbidden claims
skills.output: Script pack (angles, hooks, CTA, proof points)
skills.handoff: Batch-generate and review scripts via Creatop

skills.problem: Which content actions actually move outcomes?
skills.input: Content list + campaign metadata + simple outcome fields
skills.handoff: Feed winning patterns back to Creatop templates

skills.problem: How to ship weekly content without burnout?
skills.input: Weekly goals, team bandwidth, channel priorities
skills.handoff: Use sprint outputs to drive Creatop batch generation

skills.problem: How to present creator proof to close better deals?
skills.handoff: Attach proof pack in outreach sequence

skills.problem: How to convert comments/DMs into content pipeline?
skills.handoff: Send high-priority clusters into Creatop script queue
